title: Control factor coercion
description: Read character data as strings and convert to factors deliberately, with explicit levels.
body: Use when reading or constructing data with categorical columns. Do not let columns become factors implicitly or compare factors as if they were their labels — a factor's underlying integer codes can corrupt joins, ordering, and numeric conversion. Actions: keep text as character on import, convert to factor only where you need fixed levels, and set the levels explicitly. Validation signals include column classes matching intent and as.numeric on a factor going through as.character first. Risk boundary: as.numeric on a factor returns the level codes not the values — verify the conversion path before trusting the numbers.
